block_04: has become the fastest-growing platform in history since it was launched on July 5. With over 100 million sign-ups in its first five days (5 million in the first hour alone 🤯), Threads has surpassed ChatGPT to become the fastest app to reach 100 million users. New social media app – what does it mean for affiliates? Well the answer is simple — more opportunities.
block_06: Seen as a “friendly” alternative to Twitter, Threads is a social networking app, operated by Mark Zuckerberg’s Meta Platforms which described it as “Instagram’s text-based conversation app”. Users can share text, images, videos and interact with each other.
block_07: Following Elon Musk’s $8 subscriptions and user post limits, a lot of users have seen Threads as a serious alternative to Twitter. One particular advantage is its link to Instagram which allows users to bring across their existing usernames and followers establishing a new (old) audience.
block_08: How can you market on Threads
block_09: Threads does not currently have paid ad campaigns (at least not yet), but chances are there will be ads on Threads soon. In the meantime, users are concentrating on building an audience and organic growth. So, you can sync your Instagram account, but how is Threads different?
block_15: Use your creativity, taking all these factors into account when coming up with a marketing strategy, and keep an eye out for the ads launch on Threads.
block_16: It’s important to always stay up-to-date with the latest trends and not miss a single beat in the world of social media marketing!
